---
title: "William Archibald Clowes"
---

## William Archibald Clowes

**Dates:** (1843–1904)

### Description

printer of <i>MP</i> during the 1890s

### Biography

CMY thought the firm incompetent. Alexis Weedon, ‘Clowes, William, the younger (1807–1883)’, Oxford Dictionary of National Biography, Oxford University Press, 2004 http://www.oxforddnb.com/view/article/5720, accessed 13 Nov 2009]

### Letters

- Letter from July 20th 1891
- Letter from July 16th 1891
- Letter from June 22d 1891
- Letter from Aug 4th 1890

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
